metadata.description: A marketplace for GRU953-Studio: a Tier-sized team of specialised autonomous AI software developers, led by an AI project lead, that turns a plain-English idea and a short pop-up interview into a working, tested, privately-published app.

plugins.name: gru953-studio
plugins.description: An AI project lead plus a Tier-sized team (Tiny/Standard/Complex) of up to 23 specialised roles that interviews you by pop-up multiple-choice questions (Semi-Structured + Panel + STAR), then researches, designs, plans, codes, reviews, tests and privately publishes a working MVP to your own GitHub — under your name, as sole author. Built for non-technical users, in plain UK English.
